paint.title: Paint
paint.subtitle: Use image models for text-to-image, image-to-image and editing.
paint.empty: No paintings yet. Click “New” to start.
paint.pickModelDesc: Only models with image capability are shown.
paint.modelUnavailable: The selected image model is unavailable or no longer supports image generation. Please choose another model.
paint.promptPlaceholder: e.g. A Chinese ink landscape painting, minimal, detailed, negative space.
paint.promptOrImageRequired: Provide a prompt or an input image
paint.inputImageRequiredForEditModel: This looks like an edit/img2img model. Please add an input image first.
paint.advancedProviderOptionsHelp: Use this for native provider extension fields. It is intended for people who know the upstream API; standard parameters remain controlled above.
paint.advancedProviderOptionsDescription: Enter native provider JSON. Leave it blank to send no advanced parameters.
paint.advancedProviderOptionsReservedHint: Do not override standard fields such as n, size, quality, or seed; those are owned by the controls above.
paint.advancedProviderOptionsHint: Allowed namespaces: {{providers}}. Standard parameters are owned by the controls above.
paint.advancedProviderOptionsUnavailable: This model has no advanced providerOptions namespace available.
paint.advancedProviderOptionsInvalidJson: Advanced providerOptions must be valid JSON.
paint.advancedProviderOptionsObjectRequired: Advanced providerOptions must be an object.
paint.advancedProviderOptionsNamespaceObjectRe: providerOptions for {{provider}} must be an object.
paint.advancedProviderOptionsReservedKey: Advanced providerOptions cannot override standard parameter {{key}}.

paramHelp.seed: Random seed; if supported, the same settings and seed reproduce results.
paramHelp.size: Output size, e.g. 1024x1024; supported values vary by model.
paramHelp.aspectRatio: Image aspect ratio, e.g. 16:9; supported values vary by model.
paramHelp.quality: Rendering quality tier; supported values vary by model.

paint.noInputImages: No input images (required for edit/img2img models).
paint.previewHint: Type a prompt below and click “Generate”, or add input images for edit/img2img.
